repo_signals: write a Go service with context cancellation and error wrapping

retrieval_query: lora qlora peft adapter quantization int4 bfloat16 distillation catastrophic forgetting rlhf evaluate base

validation_smoke.name: code.fine-tuning L3 validation smoke
signals: the fine-tuned model beats the base on the task eval without regressing a capability holdout
a quantized checkpoint stays within an accepted quality delta of the full-precision model
an adapter loads onto the exact base version and tokenizer it was trained against

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.fine-tuning diagnosis smoke
signals: the fine-tuned model gains task accuracy but loses general capabilities (catastrophic forgetting)
a merged adapter degrades because it was merged into a different base than it was trained on
